name: filter
label: Filter (encoded query)
description: Optional encoded query to scope the rows.

name: sourceField
label: Source field
description: Field whose value is one end of each link, e.g. 'assignment_group'.

name: targetField
label: Target field
description: Field whose value is the other end of each link, e.g. 'category'.

name: metric
label: Metric
description: Link weight: count | sum | avg | min | max. Default 'count'.

name: valueField
label: Value field
description: Numeric field to aggregate (required when metric is not 'count').

name: useDisplayValue
label: Use display values for nodes
description: Build nodes from display values (readable) instead of raw values.
